name: Pasta Garbanzos
recipeIngredient: 5 red or yellow bell peppers, diced
2 fennel bulbs, cored and diced (reserve minced tops for garnish)
1 cup chopped fresh basil or 1-1/2 tbsp. dried basil
3 cups cooked garbanzo beans (1-1/2 cans), rinsed and drained
3 tbsp. lemon juice or balsamic vinegar
1/2 cup grated Parmesan cheese (or soy parmesan)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the broiler.
2. Mix diced peppers, fennel bulbs, and some of the tops with tomatoes and basil in a bowl. Spread vegetables evenly over a large baking pan.
3. Generously spray vegetables and broil until softened and blackened slightly, stirring occasionally for about 15 minutes.
4. Combine beans, crushed red pepper, and lemon juice or vinegar in a large serving bowl.
5. Toast fennel seeds in a small pan until darkened slightly, then add to the bean mixture.
6. Add boiled vegetables, hot pasta, and cheese to the bean mixture; toss well.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Sprinkle reserved minced fennel leaves on top.
9. Serves 6.
